entity: Karl Malone career regular-season total rebounds = 14,968 (BBR). Warehouse SUM(avg_reb*gp) undercounts at 14,627 (delta 341)

query_target.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(avg_reb * gp)) AS career_reb FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 252 AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: REGRESSION: warehouse sums to 14,627 REB but BBR's official Karl Malone career regular-season rebounding total is 14,968. The 341-rebound gap is consistent with the same agg_player_season gap as career_total.malone_pts. Flip to stable when the warehouse value equals 14,968.
